title: agrostis alba var. albida
intro: Agrostis alba var. albida, also known as White Bent Grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of White Bent Grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, although its preparation and uses may vary depending on the cultural and traditional practices.
